summary: Testing iteration 30 - Verified 4 reported UI/layout bugs in PDF stamping tool. All 4 issues have been fixed: (1) Document preview sizing now uses dynamic height 400-600px based on PDF dimensions, (2) Signature placeholder 'Sign Here' box appears on generated PDF when using Certification stamp with 'Sign After Printing', (3) 'Scan to Verify' text at 8px in horizontal stamp is visible, (4) QR code and content alignment verified working.

document_preview_sizing: Preview container uses dynamic height based on PDF dimensions - PASS
Preview shows PDF content without excess white space - PASS
signature_placeholder: Certification stamp type shows 'Requires signature' - PASS
Sign After Printing option shows signature placeholder in preview - PASS
'Sign Here' dashed box appears below stamp preview - PASS
'Sign Here' text found in generated PDF - PASS (backend test confirmed)
scan_to_verify_text: Horizontal stamp layout shows 'Scan to Verify' at text-[8px] - PASS
Vertical stamp layout shows 'Scan to Verify' at text-[6px] - PASS
Oval stamp shows 'SCAN TO VERIFY' at text-[5px] - PASS
Circle stamp uses '★ TLS VERIFIED ★' instead (design choice) - PASS
qr_alignment: Stamp preview shows QR code in correct position - PASS
Generated PDF stamp has QR code properly aligned - PASS

document_preview_dynamic_height.description: Container height dynamically adjusts based on PDF dimensions using Math.min(600, Math.max(400, pageDimensions.height * previewScale))

signature_placeholder.description: When using Certification stamp without digital signature, 'Sign Here' box appears on generated PDF. Backend draws dashed border box with 'Sign Here' text centered.

scan_to_verify_visibility.description: 'Scan to Verify' text increased from 6px to 8px in horizontal layout, 4px to 6px in vertical layout

stamp_layout_alignment.description: QR code and content alignment matches between preview and generated PDF. All stamp shapes generate correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 reported bugs have been verified as fixed: (1) Document preview sizing uses dynamic height 400-600px, (2) Signature placeholder 'Sign Here' appears on generated PDFs for Certification stamps with 'Sign After Printing' option, (3) 'Scan to Verify' text visibility improved to 8px in horizontal layout, (4) QR code alignment correct. Test PDFs saved at /tmp/stamped_*.pdf for inspection.
